args.text: Retention rules checked: exports held 30 days, then deletion per deletion-schedule.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd has been prepared and is ready for processing.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: Your Halcyon access has been revoked as of today. Thank you for your business.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued against order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract on 30 April 2026.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320. Customer notified via email to accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: The deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd has been confirmed. All exported data will be permanently deleted on 2026-08-16 (30 days from offboarding).
